name: pyx-scan
summary: PYX Scan checks AI agent skills against the PYX Scanner service and formats a concise, human-readable safety report. It consistently calls the API at runtime, handles common HTTP and network errors gracefully, and never softens a FAILED verdict. The tool requires network access but does not escalate privileges or modify system state beyond fetching scan results.

about.purpose: Verify whether an AI agent skill is safe before installation or use by querying the PYX Scanner API.
capabilities: Query PYX Scanner API with owner/name
Parse JSON response to determine verdict
Format a markdown report with trust and risk scores
about.security_notes: Does not execute external code or install untrusted skills; outputs are purely informational.
